title: hieracium laurinum subsp. hypericifolium
intro: Hieracium laurinum subsp. hypericifolium, also known as hawkweed or false hawkweed, is a flowering plant species within the dandelion-like hawkweed genus. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional herbal medicine, where it is valued for its astringent, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The plant's leaves and flowers are used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, wounds, and infections, due to its health benefits such as reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of Hieracium laurinum subsp. hypericifolium include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used externally or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
